hindi: नारायण परं ब्रह्म तत्त्वं नारायणः परः।
english: Narayana is the Supreme Brahman; Narayana is the supreme reality
roman: Narayana param Brahma tattvam Narayanah parah

hindi: नारायणः परं धाम नारायणः परो गतिः।
english: Narayana is the supreme abode; Narayana is the supreme goal
roman: Narayanah param dhama Narayanah paro gatih

hindi: नारायणः परो धाता नारायणः परो विधिः।
english: Narayana is the supreme supporter; Narayana is the supreme ordainer
roman: Narayanah paro dhata Narayanah paro vidhih

hindi: नारायणः परं ज्योतिः नारायणः परो हरिः।
english: Narayana is the supreme light; Narayana is the supreme Hari
roman: Narayanah param jyotih Narayanah paro Harih

hindi: नारायणः परं मंत्रं नारायणः पर तत्।
english: Narayana is the supreme mantra; Narayana is the supreme That
roman: Narayanah param mantram Narayanah para tat

hindi: नारायणः परो देवो ह्यनन्तो भगवान् विभुः।
english: Narayana is the supreme God, truly infinite, the glorious, all-pervading
roman: Narayanah paro devo hyananato Bhagavan vibhuh

english: Whoever studies this daily, devoted to Narayana
roman: Ya idam nityam adhyeti Narayana parayanah

english: Is not troubled by the world and goes to the state of Padmanabha
roman: Nayam klishyati samsare Padmanabha padam vrajet
